description: Browser tasks, sessions, and recipes for MCP and HTTP automation.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.jojo-labs/web-task-api

environmentVariables.description: Optional mutable data root for web-task-api runs, sessions, profiles, and temp state. When omitted, the runtime uses a platform user-data directory instead of the ambient cwd.
environmentVariables.name: WEB_TASK_API_DATA_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Optional recipes directory override. When omitted, web-task-api reads bundled recipes from the installed package.
environmentVariables.name: WEB_TASK_API_RECIPES_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Optional temp root override used when incoming temp env variables point at your home directory or working directory.
environmentVariables.name: WEB_TASK_API_TEMP_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Optional PI engine base URL for the preferred planner backend. Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:8793.
environmentVariables.name: WEB_TASK_API_PI_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional planner model override passed through to the PI engine backend.
environmentVariables.name: WEB_TASK_API_PI_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Optional PI thinking variant override for the preferred planner backend.
environmentVariables.name: WEB_TASK_API_PI_VARIANT

environmentVariables.description: Optional CLIProxy base URL for the legacy fallback planner backend.
environmentVariables.name: CLIPROXY_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional CLIProxy auth token for the legacy fallback planner backend.
environmentVariables.name: CLIPROXY_AUTH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional CLIProxy model alias for the legacy fallback planner backend.
environmentVariables.name: CLIPROXY_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Optional OpenCode base URL for the compatibility planner backend.
environmentVariables.name: OPENCODE_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional OpenCode model name for the compatibility planner backend. Defaults to openai/gpt-5.4-mini.
environmentVariables.name: OPENCODE_MODEL

environmentVariables.description: Optional existing Chromium/Chrome user-data directory for warmed browser state reuse.
environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_USER_DATA_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Optional Playwright browser channel override, for example `chrome`.
environmentVariables.name: BROWSER_CHANNEL

environmentVariables.description: Optional browser headless toggle. Set `false` to prefer a visible browser.
environmentVariables.name: HEADLESS

title: Web Task
